channel.title: Farcaster on Juan Gramajo
channel.description: Recent content in Farcaster on Juan Gramajo

item.title: Farcaster Daily, AMA's
item.description:
I will be running an AMA with Bastien later this month. To recap the event I was planning on using this tool called blabla to create a piece of content that can be enjoyed again and again without just pasting them into my newsletter. This tool seems like it will make text-based AMAs have some sort of life post event. Looking forward to getting access and using it with Bastien.

An example of this tool and its utility can be found here.

item.title: Farcaster Daily, Onchain Media
item.description:
I’ve been diving deeper and deeper into minting my work onchain. From my newsletter to my podcast (You can find my newsletter here, and podcast here).

In today’s post I want to highlight the Surreal team. They make a good looking app that helps you find, collect and enjoy the media you have acquired along the way. You can find more information in their Farcaster channel.

Subscribe to my blog via Email or RSS feed. If you subscribe via email, I will only send you an email once every two weeks.
